Join RE/MAX, LLC.
RE/MAX LLC is dedicated to helping individuals thrive in positive, productive and inclusive environments.

Together, we deliver the best experience in everything real estate. Not only do we sell RE/MAX and Motto Mortgage franchises, we also service those franchise owners through business consulting, marketing, training and technology across the globe. Everything we do is focused on helping our franchisees improve how they do business and become more profitable.

Our Brands

RE/MAX was founded in 1973 by Dave and Gail Liniger. The company (NYSE: RMAX) is headquartered in Denver, CO, and is one of the leading global real estate franchisors with over 140,000 agents in more than 110 countries and territories.
